title: sabulina helmii var. helmii
intro: Sabulina helmii var. helmii, also known as Sea Sandwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. It is primarily found in coastal areas and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve skin conditions. The plant is traditionally used to treat various ailments, including skin irritations, wounds, and infections, due to its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. In herbal preparations, Sabulina helmii var. helmii is often used in infusions, tinctures, and salves to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations.
